list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Barbie Malibu and Barbie Brooklyn attend a performing arts high school in NYC for a year. They
list.vod_content: Barbie Malibu and Barbie Brooklyn attend a performing arts high school in NYC for a year. They set out to record a music demo, take odd jobs to fund their dream, explore the Big Apple, and travel back to Malibu to visit family and friends.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Barbie&#39;s younger sister Chelsea is trying to celebrate her 7th birthday but her birthday i
list.vod_content: Barbie's younger sister Chelsea is trying to celebrate her 7th birthday but her birthday is skipped due to the international date line.
